---
title: "Join Our Lab"
format: html
---

The Oladipupo Lab is a group of people committed to building sustainable, science-based tools that reduce the burden of urban insect pests.

Before you email, please read our [research themes](research.html) and pick the two or three papers from our [Publications](publications.html) page that interest you most. Your email should reference at least one.


## Interested in Joining?

If you are interested in joining our team, please email [**Seun**](mailto:Oladipupo.7@osu.edu) with:

- A short CV
- A brief paragraph on your research interest and what draws you to our program
- For graduate applicants, your intended degree program and expected start term

## Important for Prospective Graduate Students

The [**Department of Entomology**](https://entomology.osu.edu/home) and [**Environmental Sciences**](https://esgp.osu.edu/) graduate programs admit students directly into research labs (without rotations). Admission is contingent on finding a faculty advisor who can support and mentor you throughout your degree. Because of this, it is essential to reach out and start a conversation with us **before** submitting an application

For those hoping to start in **Fall**, applications should be completed by **December 1** of the previous year
